name: python3-scp
title: python3-scp
description:
scp module for paramiko (Python 3)
The scp.py module uses a paramiko transport to send and receive files via the
scp1 protocol. This is the protocol as referenced from the openssh scp program,
and has only been tested with this implementation.
.
This package contains the Python 3 module for scp.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-scp because scp module for paramiko (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-scp as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-scp with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-scp --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
